name: go_clean_architecture_backend_change
prompt: Go API に新しいユースケース、HTTP handler、GORM repository を追加してください。
expected_behavior: Inspects existing backend conventions before editing.
Keeps domain/usecase independent from HTTP and GORM.
Places business workflow in usecase and transport mapping in handler.
Uses repository interfaces and infrastructure implementations.
Runs or reports available formatter/lint/test commands.
